name: Virtual Engineering Team
description: A compact virtual engineering team modeled on garrytan/gstack. Runs your product idea through a 7-stage sprint (Think → Plan → Build → Review → Test → Ship → Reflect) with role sub-agents (Host, CEO, Eng Mgr, Designer, Staff Eng reviewer, QA, CSO, Release, Retro). Every role's system prompt is the verbatim SKILL.md from gstack — no invented prompts. Ships as a Vite + React app backed by an auto-generated Prisma + SQLite CRUD server.

integrations.description: Track sprints, artifacts, and ship decisions
Broadcast review verdicts, QA reports, and ship notes to the team
Store design docs, retros, and postmortems

attribution.note: Every .shogo/skills/gstack-*/SKILL.md body is a verbatim byte-identical port of the upstream file at the pinned commit.
